title: Analytics - Find My Device Opened
scenario: Logs "findMyDevice_opened" event when user opens the "Find My Device" screen, with event counts updated after a few hours.
steps: Wait a few hours for event counts to update.

Verify the dashboard includes the following elements: graph for the event, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
expected: The event 'findMyDevice_opened' is logged when the user opens the 'Find My Device' screen. Event counts are updated after a few hours. The default dashboard displays all specified elements: graph for the event, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
